summary: Reposted Fox Business interview segment. A split-screen shows footage at left of a glass storefront door with decals reading 'EBT ACCEPTED,' 'NO SOLICITING,' and 'DEVCON Security,' beside a fast-food menu image, and a woman speaking as a remote guest at right against an outdoor backdrop. Lower-thirds read 'EARNINGS ALERT' and a McDonald's earnings line, with market tickers for Dow futures, Bitcoin, and oil. The audio is the guest describing efforts to crack down on benefits fraud. The tweet text refers to SNAP fraud enforcement.

script.scene: Split-screen Fox Business segment: storefront door decaled 'EBT ACCEPTED' at left, woman guest at right; market tickers and 'EARNINGS ALERT' banner.
